text:
The paper exists on OpenReview with the exact title "ORCaS: Unsupervised Depth Completion via Occluded Region Completion as Supervision," and the ICLR 2026 submissions page confirms the author list **Hyoungseob Park, Runjian Chen, Patrick Rim, Dong Lao, Alex Wong** — matching the cited reference exactly.

VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists on OpenReview as an ICLR 2026 accepted poster with the exact title (capitalized as "ORCaS") and the author list — Hyoungseob Park, Runjian Chen, Patrick Rim, Dong Lao, Alex Wong — matches the cited reference precisely. The only discrepancy is minor capitalization ("Orcas" vs. "ORCaS"), which is not indicative of hallucination.
LINK: https://openreview.net/forum?id=v2skNLbrfF
